items.title: China Has Its Own Nvidia. Watch This Stock as AI-Driven Sales Soar 4,000%.
items.description: It's unclear whether Nvidia will be able to sell its chips in China in future. One Chinese chip maker is taking advantage.

items.title: Canada Goose gets take-private bids valuing it at about $1.4 billion, CNBC says
items.description: Private equity firm Bain, which acquired a majority stake in Canada Goose in 2013, is looking to offload its holding and Goldman Sachs is advising on the sale, though the final decision is on hold till more offers roll in, the report said.  U.S.-listed shares of Canada Goose were up about 9% in premarket trading on Wednesday, after having risen about 21% for the year so far.  CNBC said private equity firms Advent International and Boyu Capital have made verbal offers to buy Canada Goose, a company best known for its luxury parkas that has diversified into eyewear, rainwear and summer-ready collections.

items.title: NextEra Energy Rallies Despite Big, Beautiful Bill's Blow to Clean Energy: Is the Stock Still a Buy?
items.author: William Dahl
items.description: NextEra Energy remains resilient despite potential clean energy tax credit rollbacks, with strong positioning in renewable energy and potential growth from AI-driven electricity demand. The company continues its dividend growth streak and maintains optimism about future projects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite legislative challenges, the company has a strong renewable energy portfolio, plans for expansion, potential AI-driven electricity demand growth, consistent dividend increases, and ability to qualify for remaining tax credits
